        约束:
        - 只使用材料里出现的信息，不要编造外部事实。
        - 明确区分“事实信息”“原作者观点”“需要验证的问题”。
        - 投资相关内容只做研究观察，不给买卖建议、仓位建议或交易指令。
        - 优先提取对 AI 基建、半导体/PCB/光通信、工具链、市场情绪、个人效率有用的信号。
        - 对低信噪比、重复、鸡汤、缺少来源的内容要直接降权。
        - 输出要适合 Telegram 阅读：重点清晰，避免长篇复述。

        ### 1. BofA: Optical FAUs 🚀 CPO and FAU Market Outlook > Market Take-off: Nvidia's CPO switch volume is expected to remain relatively low in the near term. A meaningful volume is proje...

                BofA: Optical FAUs

🚀 CPO and FAU Market Outlook

> Market Take-off: Nvidia's CPO switch volume is expected to remain relatively low in the near term. A meaningful volume is projected to take off in 2028–2029 as scale-up penetration increases. 

> Shipment Forecasts: BofA expects Nvidia CPO switch shipments to reach 14k units in 2026E, 52k in 2027E, and 190k in 2028E. 

> Massive TAM by 2030: The Total Addressable Market (TAM) for FAUs in Nvidia CPO switches is projected to reach US$8 billion by 2030E, based on an estimated 1.4 million CPO switch units. 

> BOM Contribution: FAUs are expected to contribute 5% to 10% of the CPO switch Bill of Materials (BOM), with an Average Selling Price (ASP) ranging from US$80 to US$200. 

⚙️ Key Technical Barriers to Entry

> Micron-Level Alignment: Pitch tolerance must be controlled at < +/- 0.5 um (for NPO) or even < +/- 0.3 um (for CPO) to prevent linear error accumulation and ensure low-loss transmission. 

> Automation Requirements: As channel counts rise from 20–36 to 60–100, manual alignment is becoming unsustainable. In-house automatic alignment and testing are critical for consistent quality and yield.

⚡ GlassBridge is Not an Immediate Threat

> Early Stage: Despite market concerns, Corning’s wafer-based GlassBridge solution is in its infancy and unlikely to be adopted in current or next-generation CPO designs. 

> Existing Bottlenecks: GlassBridge faces horizontal "edge coupling" limitations, including misalignment with the Photonic Integrated Circuit (PIC) due to uneven surfaces, space constraints, extreme alignment requirements, and the inability to conduct wafer-scale testing. 

$GLW $MRVL $AVGO $HIMX $LITE $COHR $FN $NVDA $TSMC

                1/ 美联储主席凯文·沃什今天在参议院听证会上的核心表态

2/ 最核心原文（与参议员Jack Reed交流，全段直引）：
“The supply shock of AI has an effect on demand and supply. We see the effect on demand much more quickly. We see it in the capital investment I referenced. We see it in the prices of chips that are going up. We’re inferring... when the effects will happen on the supply side of the economy. I don’t view a one-time change in prices as necessarily being inflationary because I think there’s a supply response. In that way, this is different from a foreign conflict... Will it increase measured prices over the course of the next 12 months? I suspect it will be. Whether that’s inflationary or not, that’s up to the Federal Reserve...”

他的逻辑顺序：供给冲击 → 需求端快速显现（capex + 芯片涨价） → 供给响应滞后推断 → 测量的物价短期上行概率高，但不自动等于持久通胀。

3/ 时间轴：
2026 Now：需求端已快速显现（We see it in the capital investment... prices of chips that are going up）。存储、先进封装、光模块、功率器件、关键材料环节订单与价格支撑仍在。
Next 12 Months：他明确怀疑“it will increase measured prices”。对应AI服务器组件、玻璃基板/TGV相关材料、InP激光器等环节的成本传导压力。
Later：供给响应（capacity buildout & efficiency）开始显现。
